g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Supervisor read Agent Cards to make routing decisions?')
sendPrompt('How does the Architect decompose tasks into multi-file projects?')
sendPrompt('How does the Coder generate multi-file projects?')
sendPrompt('How does the Test Writer generate pytest suites?')
sendPrompt('How does QA validate pytest results?')
sendPrompt('How does the deps resolver detect external imports?')
sendPrompt('How does ruff static analysis work as a pre-check?')
sendPrompt('How does the Docker executor handle timeouts and cleanup?')
sendPrompt('How does the human approval gate work with interrupt_before?')

svg.text: Purple = AI agents (Ollama) | Coral = deterministic tools | Blue = infrastructure
